heading: Office of Naval Research: duties
label: 8022 Office of Naval Research: duties
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5151(a)(20th through 111th words).5 U.S.C. 475(22d through 114th words), .Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 727, § 160 Stat. 7795151(b)(2d sentence).5 U.S.C. 475d(a)(2d sentence), .Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 727, § 5(a)60 Stat. 7805151(c)(2d sentence).5 U.S.C. 475(2d sentence), .Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 727, § 160 Stat. 779In subsection (c) the words “shall have full force and effect as such” are omitted as surplusage.

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 5022 of this title2016—Subsec. (a). , which directed amendment of “, United States Code,” by striking the par. (1) designation and by striking par. (2), without specifying the subsection of section 5022 to be amended, was executed by striking the par. (1) designation before “There is in the Office” in subsec. (a) and by striking par. (2) of subsec. (a) to reflect the probable intent of Congress. Par. (2) of subsec. (a) read as follows: “Unless appointed to higher grade under another provision of law, an officer, while serving in the Office of Naval Research as Chief of Naval Research, has the rank of rear admiral.”Pub. L. 107–107, div. A, title II, § 262115 Stat. 1044Dec. 28, 2001Dec. 28, 2001Feb. 1, 2004

children.label: a
children.text: There is in the Office of the Secretary of the Navy an Office of Naval Research.
the encouragement, promotion, planning, initiation, and coordination of naval research;
the conduct of naval research in augmentation of and in conjunction with the research and development conducted by the bureaus and other agencies and offices of the Department of the Navy;

the supervision, administration, and control of activities within or for the Department relating to patents, inventions, trademarks, copyrights, and royalty payments, and matters connected therewith; and

the execution of, and management responsibility for, programs for which funds are provided in the basic and applied research and advanced technology categories of the Department of the Navy research, development, test, and evaluation budget in such a manner that will foster the transition of science and technology to higher levels of research, development, test, and evaluation.

children.label: c
children.text: Sufficient information relative to estimates of appropriations for research by the several bureaus and offices shall be furnished to the Office of Naval Research to assist it in coordinating naval research and carrying out its other duties.

children.label: d
children.text: The Office of Naval Research shall perform its duties under the authority of the Secretary, and its orders are considered as coming from the Secretary.
